title: M Crunchy Peanut Gimbap
description: A floral, crunchy Korean dish featuring peanut cookies in a gimbap form, vegan-friendly and perfect for show-off snacks.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Greens (such as spinach or lettuce)

instructions: Place a sheet of rice paper on a flat surface.
Spread about half the peanut cookies over one end of the rice paper.
Sprinkle with fresh, blanched vegetable greens and avocado slices on top of the peanut cookies.
Fold the bottom edge of the rice paper up to cover the vegetables and wrap around in a roll shape.
Gently heat the assembled gimbap by placing it under the broiler for about 30 seconds or until the rice paper is warm and slightly crispy.
